description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.14.1-jessie Docker image, includes a postgres:9.6.5-alpine service, and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named test and add a mocha job in that stage. The mocha job runs the commands npm install, npm rebuild, export $(cat .env_tests), node setup_test_db.js, and ./node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha test/* in order.
